name: xiaodai-test-expert-marketplace
description: 效贷业务线功能测试专家私有市场，提供测试用例全流程生成（文档整理→需求评审→测试点→用例→入库）与时间节省追踪能力。v1.3.4 新增 Confluence 页面提取作为步骤①的轻量入口。

plugins.name: xiaodai-testing-expert
plugins.description: An AI expert for Xiaodai business line functional testing, powered by ai-testcase-workflow-skill covering the full pipeline from requirement consolidation to knowledge archiving. v1.3.4 adds Confluence page extraction as a lightweight alternative entry to document consolidation.
